message:
feat(render): add elapsed-based degradation upgrade and i18n locale tests

RenderBudget (budget.rs):
- Add last_frame_time field to track measured render+present duration
  from the previous frame, enabling more accurate budget decisions
- Add should_upgrade_with_elapsed() that checks upgrade eligibility
  using actual measured frame time rather than only wall-clock
  remaining fraction, preventing premature upgrades when frames
  are consistently near-budget
- Add remaining_fraction_for_elapsed() helper for the calculation

i18n e2e tests (i18n_e2e.rs):
- Add Section 8: Locale Context runtime tests covering:
  - Basic set/get locale operations
  - Scoped override LIFO (push/pop) semantics
  - Nested override stacking behavior
  - Version counter increments on locale changes
  - Thread-safety of locale context operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
